title: Abydise
description:
Modpack for the Abydise server

Contains several mods to enhance and enrich the Minecraft experience while maintaining the vanilla essence.

Featured Mods: Create, Distant Horizons
body:
Modpack for the Abydise server, a server with territories where everyone can build a civilization, explore the world in search of mysteries, or delve into the world of engineering.

This modpack adds the ability to claim your own territories to protect them from other players with the mod _Open parties and Claims_, or share them with your friends. You can choose the path of engineering with the _Create_ mod or the path of magic with the _Ars Noveau_ mod. It also includes the _Distant Horizons_ mod to view other players' bases from a distance, and **the modpack is very well optimized**.
It also has several **visual and quality of life mods** to improve gameplay.

It contains several mods to enhance and enrich the Minecraft experience while maintaining the vanilla essence, if what you want is a Minecraft without adding unnecessary things and being able to protect your belongings from other players, this modpack is for you.
